speaker: IMOGEN
text: Who’s there? My woman Helen?

speaker: LADY
text: Please you, madam.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: What hour is it?

speaker: LADY
text: Almost midnight, madam.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: I have read three hours then. Mine eyes are weak.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Fold down the leaf where I have left. To bed.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Take not away the taper; leave it burning.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: And if thou canst awake by four o’ th’ clock,

speaker: IMOGEN
text:
I prithee, call me.
                 
                (
                Lady
                 
                exits
                .
                )
               Sleep hath seized me wholly.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: To your protection I commend me, gods.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: From fairies and the tempters of the night

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Guard me, beseech you.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: The crickets sing, and man’s o’erlabored sense

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Repairs itself by rest. Our Tarquin thus

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Did softly press the rushes ere he wakened

speaker: IACHIMO
text: The chastity he wounded.—Cytherea,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: How bravely thou becom’st thy bed, fresh lily,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: And whiter than the sheets.—That I might touch!

speaker: IACHIMO
text: But kiss, one kiss! Rubies unparagoned,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: How dearly they do ’t. ’Tis her breathing that

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Perfumes the chamber thus. The flame o’ th’ taper

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Bows toward her and would underpeep her lids

speaker: IACHIMO
text: To see th’ enclosèd lights, now canopied

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Under these windows, white and azure-laced

speaker: IACHIMO
text: With blue of heaven’s own tinct. But my design:

speaker: IACHIMO
text: To note the chamber. I will write all down.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Such and such pictures; there the window; such

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Th’ adornment of her bed; the arras, figures,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Why, such and such; and the contents o’ th’ story.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Ah, but some natural notes about her body

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Above ten thousand meaner movables

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Would testify t’ enrich mine inventory.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: O sleep, thou ape of death, lie dull upon her,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: And be her sense but as a monument

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Thus in a chapel lying.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Come off, come off;

speaker: IACHIMO
text: As slippery as the Gordian knot was hard.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: ’Tis mine, and this will witness outwardly

speaker: IACHIMO
text: As strongly as the conscience does within

speaker: IACHIMO
text: To th’ madding of her lord. On her left breast

speaker: IACHIMO
text: A mole cinque-spotted, like the crimson drops

speaker: IACHIMO
text: I’ th’ bottom of a cowslip. Here’s a voucher

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Stronger than ever law could make. This secret

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Will force him think I have picked the lock and ta’en

speaker: IACHIMO
text: The treasure of her honor. No more. To what end?

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Why should I write this down that’s riveted,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Screwed to my memory? She hath been reading late

speaker: IACHIMO
text: The tale of Tereus; here the leaf’s turned down

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Where Philomel gave up. I have enough.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: To th’ trunk again, and shut the spring of it.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Swift, swift, you dragons of the night, that dawning

speaker: IACHIMO
text: May bare the raven’s eye. I lodge in fear.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Though this a heavenly angel, hell is here.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: One, two, three. Time, time!
